help.title: Help center
help.subtitle: Everything you need to use Abbiatti day to day
help.footer: Need more help? Contact your organization administrator.

start.title: Quick start
start.desc: First steps to set up your account
start.s1: Create your account and confirm your email.
start.s2: Add your organization info in Settings → Organization.
start.s3: Create your first property from the Properties tab.
start.s4: Invite your team (cleaning, driver, co-host) from the Team tab.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.s1: See number of properties, members, and active tasks.
dashboard.s2: Use quick actions to add a property in one click.

properties.title: Properties
properties.s1: Click "Add property" then fill in the info.
properties.s2: Tip: paste an Airbnb / Booking / Vrbo link to auto-fill the form.
properties.s3: Set the access code and entry instructions for guests.
properties.s4: Activate or deactivate a property based on availability.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.s1: Add a reservation manually or via an iCal calendar.
reservations.s2: Fill in guest info (name, WhatsApp, language, arrival time).
reservations.s3: Pick a message template and open WhatsApp in one click.
reservations.s4: Sync all calendars with the "Sync" button.

ical.title: iCal calendars
ical.s1: On Airbnb: Calendar → Availability → Export calendar.
ical.s2: Copy the iCal link and paste it in Reservations → Add iCal link.
ical.s3: Sync runs automatically and new reservations appear.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.s1: Create a task, choose type, property, and assignee.
tasks.s2: The member sees the task in "My tasks" and clicks Start.
tasks.s3: They take photos before / during / after and report any issue.
tasks.s4: They finish the task and rate guest satisfaction.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.s1: Add items (linen, products, consumables) per property.
inventory.s2: Set an alert threshold to be warned of low stock.
inventory.s3: Filter by category or show only low stock.

team.title: Team
team.s1: Click "Add a member" then choose their role.
team.s2: A temporary password is generated, share it with the member.
team.s3: Assign the member to the relevant properties.
team.s4: The member logs in and only sees their properties and tasks.

qr.title: QR code login
qr.s1: In Team, click "Generate login QR" for a member.
qr.s2: Print the QR code (valid for 1 hour).
qr.s3: The member scans the QR with their phone: they're logged in.

templates.title: Message templates
templates.s1: Go to Settings → Messages to create your templates.
templates.s2: Write the message in French, English and Arabic.

settings.title: Settings
settings.s1: Profile: your name, phone, preferred language.
settings.s2: Organization: name and info visible to your team.
settings.s3: Security: change your password or request an email link.

lang.title: Languages
lang.s1: Use the language switcher in the top right.
lang.s2: The interface flips to RTL automatically for Arabic.

guestbook.title: Digital guestbook
guestbook.s1: Go to Guestbooks → Create a guestbook for a property.
guestbook.s2: Share the public link or QR code with your guest at the end of their stay.
guestbook.s3: The guest leaves a rating and comment in seconds.
guestbook.s4: Browse all reviews and the average rating from the dashboard.

tickets.title: Issues & Tickets
tickets.desc: Problems and incidents reported by guests
tickets.s1: Generate a reporting link from the Tickets tab for each property.
tickets.s2: The guest scans the QR code and reports a problem with photos.
tickets.s3: The ticket appears in Tickets — assign it to a team member.
tickets.s4: Track the progress (open → in progress → resolved) and notify the guest.

showcase.title: Public showcase
showcase.desc: Simple web page for your listings
showcase.s1: Enable the showcase from Settings → Public showcase.
showcase.s2: Pick the properties to display and personalize the layout.
showcase.s3: Share the public link on your social networks or WhatsApp.
showcase.s4: Visitors can send a reservation request directly.

bookings.title: Reservation requests
bookings.s1: New requests appear in Reservation requests.
bookings.s2: View the details (dates, guests, message) and contact the customer.
bookings.s3: Accept or decline the request, then create the official reservation.
bookings.s4: The customer is notified automatically by WhatsApp or email.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp reminders
whatsapp.s1: From a reservation, click "Send a WhatsApp reminder".
whatsapp.s2: Pick the message type (arrival, access code, departure, review).
whatsapp.s3: WhatsApp opens with the message pre-filled in the guest's language.
whatsapp.s4: Check and send — the message is personalized with stay details.

reports.title: Reports & Statistics
reports.s1: Open the Reports page to see your performance.
reports.s2: Filter by period (week, month, year) and by property.
reports.s3: Export data to CSV for accounting or archives.

q1.q: Can I manage multiple properties with one account?
q1.a: Yes, you can add as many properties as you want in the same organization.

q2.q: Do my members see all properties?
q2.a: No. Each member only sees the properties you assigned them to.

q3.q: How do I avoid double bookings?
q3.a: Connect the iCal calendars from Airbnb, Booking and Vrbo. Reservations sync automatically.

q4.q: What if a member doesn't have an email?
q4.a: Generate a login QR code from the Team tab. They scan it and they're in.

q5.q: How do I change my language?
q5.a: Click the language switcher (FR / EN / AR) in the top right.

q6.q: How do I reset my password?
q6.a: Go to Settings → Security → "Email me a reset link".

rentals.title: Extras & Services
rentals.subtitle: Extra revenue items to offer at booking or arrival
rentals.name: Item / Service

reports.title: Monthly reports
reports.subtitle: Generate a PDF summary of reservations and revenue by month and property.

superAdmin.title: Super Admin
superAdmin.subtitle: Platform-wide view with global access to organizations, properties, cohosts and employees.
superAdmin.deleteDescription: This action is irreversible. All related data will be deleted.

cards.samePortalBody: Properties and Cohosts keep the admin look, but super-admin remains global.
cards.extraSectionsBody: The super-admin menu adds platform management and billing above the regular admin sections.

superAdminStaff.title: Platform team
superAdminStaff.subtitle: Technicians, developers, accountants, support
superAdminStaff.requiredFieldsBody: Email, password and role are required.
superAdminStaff.unauthorized: This action is reserved for Super Admins. Your session does not have the required permissions.
superAdminStaff.empty: No platform team members yet. Create the first account.
superAdminStaff.removeRoleDescription: The role "{{role}}" will be removed. The user account stays active.

superAdminBilling.title: Super Admin Billing
superAdminBilling.subtitle: Pricing and invoices by organization
superAdminBilling.nothingToBill: Nothing to bill for this period
superAdminBilling.periodHint: Billing period used when generating invoices

superAdminRoles.adminsSubtitle: Manage organization admins and co-admins across all organizations.
superAdminRoles.employeesSubtitle: Manage cleaners, drivers, decorators, maintenance and staff across all organizations.
superAdminRoles.profilesSubtitle: Manage all other users — guests, unassigned accounts and platform roles that aren't admins, cohosts or employees.

superAdminProfiles.title: Profiles
superAdminProfiles.subtitle: Review every profile and manage roles from one super-admin-only workspace.
superAdminProfiles.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or phone
superAdminProfiles.selfRoleLocked: You cannot change your own role here.
superAdminProfiles.selfRoleHint: Your own role is locked to avoid accidentally removing super-admin access.
superAdminProfiles.scopeMismatchTitle: This role belongs to a different scope
superAdminProfiles.scopeMismatchBody: Agency profiles can switch between agency roles, while platform profiles can switch between platform roles.
superAdminProfiles.roleUpdateFailed: Could not update the profile role
superAdminProfiles.selfBanLocked: You cannot ban your own account.
superAdminProfiles.confirmBanBody: This will revoke access for {{name}}. They will be logged out and unable to sign back in until unbanned.
superAdminProfiles.addMemberHint: Create a new account (or attach an existing email) to an organization.
superAdminProfiles.passwordHint: Only used for brand-new accounts. Existing emails are attached without changing their password.
superAdminProfiles.confirmRemoveBody: This removes {{name}} from every property they’re assigned to. Their account, role and organization are kept unchanged — only the property assignments are cleared.
superAdminProfiles.memberAttached: Existing user added to the organization
superAdminProfiles.cannotRemoveSuperAdmin: Super admins can’t be removed here.

adminRoles.cohostsSubtitle: Manage the cohosts in your organization.
adminRoles.employeesSubtitle: Manage cleaners, drivers, decorators, maintenance and staff in your organization.

propertyTeam.adminsOrgWide: Admins have access to every property in the organization, so they’re managed at the organization level — not per property.
propertyTeam.noEmployeeCandidates: No employees available to assign. Create employees under "Employees" in the sidebar and make sure they belong to this property’s organization.
